title: Savory Flaky Moroccan Chicken Stir-fry
description: A comforting and savory dish featuring chicken legs in a flavorful Moroccan sauce with pickled vegetables for low-sodium enjoyment.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, pepper, cumin seed, coriander powder, turmeric powder, paprika, red chili flakes if using.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the chicken, skin-side down first, and cook until golden brown on both sides (about 5 minutes per side). Remove from pan.
Reduce heat to medium. Add onions and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes until softened. Stir in pickled vegetables, chicken, vegetable stock, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until slightly thickened. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Garnish with fresh herbs (optional) and serve hot over rice or as a side dish.
